CustomField.description: This field is auto-updated when an assembly is installed via the Install Assembly button (except for Airframe assemblies). It also creates an Asset History record. Manual changes are blocked by a validation rule. Future dates are not allowed. Used mainly during setup for non-Airframe assemblies.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is auto-updated when an assembly is installed via the Install Assembly button (except for Airframe assemblies). It also creates an Asset History record. Manual changes are blocked by a validation rule. Future dates are not allowed. Used mainly during setup for non-Airframe assemblies.
CustomField.label: Last Installation Date
